name: ai-readiness
description: Check whether a website is visible to AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews). Scores AI-crawler access, JSON-LD structured data, title/meta, Open Graph, sitemap, and llms.txt, with a specific fix for each gap.

tools.name: check_ai_readiness
tools.description: Check whether a website is visible to AI search engines and return a 0-100 score, grade, and a specific fix for each gap.

tools.name: generate_ai_readiness_fixes
tools.description: Generate starter Organization + FAQPage JSON-LD and an AI-crawler-friendly robots.txt for a website.
